sep='\n'

    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-24 | 21:34 (UTC+3)'
def load(p):
    p=Path(p)
    try: return json.loads(p.read_text(errors='ignore')) if p.exists() else {}
    except Exception as exc: return {'_load_error':str(exc)}
prev=load('governance/state/bem842_verify_after_bem841_tick.json')
status_in=prev.get('status','unknown')
missing=prev.get('missing',[])
created_files=[]
if status_in=='dispatch_results_still_missing_after_bem841' or 'workflow_dispatch_results' in missing:
    # Repair first proof: ensure result writer/queue path is tested with a known workflow and one fresh item.
    p=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem843_result_writer_probe.json')
    p.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v10','workflow':'codex-runner.yml','workflow_id':'codex-runner.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-843 result-writer probe after BEM-842 missing dispatch results','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(p))
    status='result_writer_probe_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick then verify workflow_dispatch_results and processor marker'
elif status_in=='runtime_state_missing_after_dispatch_results' or 'claude_runtime_state' in missing:
    p=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem843_claude_runtime_probe.json')
    p.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v10','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-843 Claude runtime probe after dispatch result proof','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.append(str(p))
    status='claude_runtime_probe_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick then verify runtime state'
elif status_in=='real_response_missing_after_runtime' or 'real_claude_response' in missing:
    mail=Path('governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/bem843_final_response_required.md')
    mail.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
    mail.write_text('# BEM-843 | FINAL REAL CLAUDE RESPONSE REQUIRED'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Claude Internal Auditor: respond to the current multi-agent system architecture/protocol agreement request. Include Decision: APPROVED / CHANGE_REQUIRED / BLOCKED. Write to governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/bem843_claude_response.md. No issue comments.'+sep)
    p=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/bem843_claude_response_dispatch.json')
    p.write_text(json.dumps({'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v10','workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml','ref':'main','inputs':{},'reason':'BEM-843 final real Claude response retry','created_at':created},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
    created_files.extend([str(mail),str(p)])
    status='final_response_retry_queued'
    next_action='fresh tick then verify real Claude response'
else:
    status='triad_present_ready_to_process'
    next_action='process real Claude response and create agreed protocol'
state={'bem':'BEM-843','status':status,'input_status':status_in,'input_missing':missing,'created_files':created_files,'next_action':next_action,'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem843_execute_bem842_next.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem843_execute_bem842_next.md').write_text('# BEM-843 | Execute BEM-842 Next | '+status+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem843_next.md').write_text('Next: '+next_action+sep+'Operator relay forbidden. Report does not stop development.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-843'+sep+sep+'Status: '+status+sep+'Next: '+next_action+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem843_execute_bem842_next.json','governance/reports/bem843_execute_bem842_next.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem843_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl']+created_files
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Executed BEM-842 selected next action by queuing the exact probe/retry for the remaining missing proof')
